code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import API_BASE_URL from'../config';import'./SalaryReport.css';import{jsxs as _jsxs,jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const SalaryReport=()=>{const[report,setReport]=useState(null);const[error,setError]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{const fetchSalaryReport=async()=>{try{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/salary-report"));if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to fetch salary report');}const data=await response.json();setReport(data);}catch(err){setError(err.message);}};fetchSalaryReport();},[]);if(error){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"error",children:["Error: ",error]});}if(!report){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:"Loading..."});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"salary-report-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Salary Report"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{className:"salary-report-table",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Total Salary"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Total Bonus"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Total Deductions"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Total Net Salary"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:report.total_salary}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:report.total_bonus}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:report.total_deductions}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:report.total_net_salary})]})})]})]});};export default SalaryReport;
